patterns.reason: First Bun upstream tier: direct Bun JavaScript API tests under test/js/bun.
Bun shell parser/runtime conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun.spawn conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun.sqlite conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass.
Bun test-runner conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun utility API conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.

test/js/bun/empty-file.test.ts.reason: Initial upstream Bun smoke test that runs directly under Cottontail.

test/js/bun/util/stringWidth.test.ts.reason: Requires npm dependency resolution for string-width from Bun's test package dependencies.

test/js/bun/util/arraybuffersink.test.ts.reason: Bun.ArrayBufferSink smoke test passes under Cottontail's current implementation.

test/js/bun/wasm/wasi.test.js.reason: Requires Bun-compatible WASM import loader and WASI execution behavior.

test/js/bun/websocket/websocket-server.t.reason: Requires full Bun WebSocket server fixture execution and lifecycle behavior.

test/js/bun/yaml/yaml-test-suite.test.ts.reason: Requires full Bun.YAML parser conformance against the upstream YAML test suite.

test/js/bun/yaml/yaml.test.ts.reason: Requires full Bun.YAML scalar/type parsing semantics.

test/js/bun/test/mock-fn.test.js.reason: Bun test interop imports vitest, jest-extended, and @jest/globals through upstream fixtures; runner needs dependency/bootstrap support.

test/js/bun/test/ci-restrictions.test.ts.reason: Bun test runner CI restriction smoke test passes under Cottontail's current bun:test shim.

test/js/bun/archive.test.ts.reason: Bun.Archive object/blob creation mostly works, but the full upstream file includes internal tar security extraction/filtering semantics that system tar rejects.

test/js/bun/console/console-iterator.tes.reason: Requires Bun.spawnSync stdin input passthrough plus console async-iterator behavior in spawned children.

test/js/bun/console/console-table.test.t.reason: Requires Bun's exact console.table box-drawing renderer rather than Cottontail's current inspect-based fallback.

test/js/bun/cookie/cookie.test.ts.reason: Requires full Bun.serve request cookie mutation/Set-Cookie behavior; currently times out under Cottontail.

test/js/bun/cookie/cookie-exotic-inputs..reason: Requires Bun.Cookie parser edge-case compatibility for exotic whitespace, attributes, and expiration formats.

test/js/bun/cookie/cookie-expires-valida.reason: Requires exact Bun.Cookie expiration validation and error formatting across non-Date/non-number inputs.

test/js/bun/cookie/cookie-map.test.ts.reason: Requires full Bun.CookieMap mutation/snapshot serialization semantics beyond the current core implementation.

test/js/bun/cookie/cookie-security-fuzz..reason: Requires Bun.Cookie security parser parity for fuzzed quoted values, delimiters, and injection-like inputs.

test/js/bun/crypto/wpt-webcrypto.generat.reason: Large WPT-derived WebCrypto generateKey conformance file exceeds current direct-runner timeout and needs deeper WebCrypto validation.

test/js/bun/css/css.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun's real cssInternals parser/minifier implementation from bun:internal-for-testing.

test/js/bun/css/color.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun's real cssInternals color parser/serializer implementation from bun:internal-for-testing.

test/js/bun/css/css-fuzz.test.ts.reason: Long-running CSS fuzz coverage currently exceeds the direct upstream runner timeout under Cottontail.

test/js/bun/css/doesnt_crash.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun.build CSS parser/minifier parity across the upstream CSS fixture corpus.

test/js/bun/dns/dns-prefetch.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun.dns prefetch/cache statistics APIs that Cottontail does not implement yet.

test/js/bun/dns/resolve-dns.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun.dns promise-style lookup/resolve behavior with backend selection and TTL metadata.

test/js/bun/ffi/cc.test.ts.reason: Requires upstream FFI compilation fixture support plus CommonJS __dirname semantics in the bundled direct runner.

test/js/bun/ffi/ffi-error-messages.test..reason: Requires exact Bun FFI dlopen/symbol error object shape and messages.

test/js/bun/ffi/ffi.test.js.reason: Requires compiled upstream FFI fixtures from make compile-ffi-test and broader Bun FFI pointer/callback parity.

test/js/bun/glob/scan.test.ts.reason: Requires upstream test dependency fast-glob, which is not vendored into the copied Bun snapshot yet.

test/js/bun/glob/leak.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun Glob leak fixture setup and filesystem lifecycle behavior not present in the direct copied snapshot.

test/js/bun/glob/match.test.ts.reason: Requires full Bun.Glob pattern grammar parity for extglobs, braces, and platform path edge cases.

test/js/bun/glob/proto.test.ts.reason: Requires Bun.Glob scan symlink traversal/prototype option parity.

test/js/bun/globals.test.js.reason: Requires exact Bun/Web global constructor and File edge-case semantics beyond the current global polyfills.
